heading: Selections in New Mexico to supply deficiencies of school lands
label: 854 Selections in New Mexico to supply deficiencies of school lands
text: All the provisions of sections 851 and 852 of this title are made applicable to New Mexico, and the grant of school lands to said State, and indemnity therefor, shall be administered and adjusted in accordance with the provisions of such sections, anything in the Act of Congress approved , making certain grants of land to the Territory of New Mexico, and for other purposes, to the contrary notwithstanding.June 21, 1898
notes: References in TextAct of Congress approved , referred to in text, is , , which is not classified to the Code.June 21, 1898act June 21, 1898, ch. 48930 Stat. 484References to “Territory” of New Mexico were superseded by the admission of New Mexico into the Union by , , and Res. , No. 8, .act June 30, 1910, ch. 31036 Stat. 55737 Stat. 39Aug. 21, 1911
